instruction: Open Calendar and delete the event titled {TARGET} from the Work calendar. Leave every other event on that calendar untouched.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 before/after integrity); AndroidWorld validate_rows_removal_integrity over the Work calendar's event summaries — deleting all events scores 0

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar"' -e 'if not (exists calendar "Work") then make new calendar with properties {name:"Work"}' -e 'tell calendar "Work" to delete every event' -e 'set d to (current date)' -e 'repeat with n in {"Standup", "Retro", "{TARGET}"}' -e 'tell calendar "Work" to make new event with properties {summary:(contents of n), start date:d, end date:d, allday event:true}' -e 'end repeat' -e 'end tell' 2>/dev/null || true; mkdir -p "$HOME/.guibench"; osascript -e 'set s to summary of every event of calendar "Work" of application "Calendar"' -e 'set AppleScript'\''s text item delimiters to linefeed' -e 'return (s as text)' 2>/dev/null > "$HOME/.guibench/calendar.before"
osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar" to tell calendar "Work" to delete (every event whose summary is "{TARGET}")' 2>/dev/null || true
